segments.text: Welcome to RestoreAssist. In this tutorial, I'll walk you through creating your account.
Enter your name and email, and create a secure password with at least eight characters.
Add your business name and A B N. We verify your A B N automatically against the Australian Business Register.
Check your inbox for a six-digit verification code, and enter it within ten minutes to activate your account.
The Setup Wizard guides you through five steps — profile, A I hydration, integrations, health check, and activation.
Tap Activate. All twelve health checks pass, and your workspace is now live.
